query: DELETE FROM order_items WHERE product_id IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE store_id = 1 AND (name LIKE 'Halloween%' OR name LIKE 'Spooked%' OR name LIKE 'Trick%' OR name LIKE 'trick%'));
